name: My employer countersues me for "negligence" in my injury—what now?
description: Impossible. Workers comp = no-fault. Counterclaim = illegal retaliation. Lawyer dismisses.

mainEntity.name: My employer countersues me for "negligence" in my injury—what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Impossible. Workers comp = no-fault. Counterclaim = illegal retaliation. Lawyer dismisses.
